name: tripsheet-backend
description: TripSheet backend orchestrator — start all Nest services with one command

scripts.test: npm run test --prefix services/driver-service && npm run test --prefix services/fleet-service && npm run test --prefix services/accounting-service && npm run test --prefix services/notification-service
scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix gateway && npm install --prefix services/auth-service && npm install --prefix services/company-service && npm install --prefix services/driver-service && npm install --prefix services/fleet-service && npm install --prefix services/manifest-service && npm install --prefix services/tripsheet-service && npm install --prefix services/accounting-service && npm install --prefix services/notification-service
scripts.start:dev: concurrently -n gateway,auth,company,driver,fleet,manifest,tripsheet,accounting,notify -c blue,magenta,cyan,green,yellow,red,white,brightBlue,brightMagenta "npm run start:dev --prefix gateway" "npm run start:dev --prefix services/auth-service" "npm run start:dev --prefix services/company-service" "npm run start:dev --prefix services/driver-service" "npm run start:dev --prefix services/fleet-service" "npm run start:dev --prefix services/manifest-service" "npm run start:dev --prefix services/tripsheet-service" "npm run start:dev --prefix services/accounting-service" "npm run start:dev --prefix services/notification-service"
scripts.build:all: npm run build --prefix gateway && npm run build --prefix services/auth-service && npm run build --prefix services/company-service && npm run build --prefix services/driver-service && npm run build --prefix services/fleet-service && npm run build --prefix services/manifest-service && npm run build --prefix services/tripsheet-service && npm run build --prefix services/accounting-service && npm run build --prefix services/notification-service
